# PointCoordinates

A pair of coordinates defining the geodetic position of a single point, with optional elevation.

## Formalization for PointCoordinates

| Property | Constraint |
|----------|------------|
| [elevation](../properties/elevation/) | max 1 xsd:decimal |
| [latitude](../properties/latitude/) | exactly 1 xsd:decimal |
| [longitude](../properties/longitude/) | exactly 1 xsd:decimal |
